title: The Goose That Laid the Golden Eggs
lines: A man and his wife had the good fortune to possess a Goose that laid a Golden Egg every day.
Lucky as they were, they soon began to think they were not getting rich fast enough.
"Why should we wait for a single Egg a day?" said the man to his wife.
"Let us kill the Goose and take all the gold that is inside her."
The wife agreed, and they killed the Goose.
But when they cut her open, they found she was just like any other goose inside, and there was no gold at all.
Thus, by being too greedy, they lost the good thing they had.
